mnemonics.title: Dependency Types (RAW, WAR, WAW)
mnemonics.content:
**R**ead **A**fter **W**rite -> Flow (True) -> The natural, sequential flow.
**W**rite **A**fter **R**ead -> Anti -> Think: 'Writing over the data I just read invalidates the previous read'.
**W**rite **A**fter **W**rite -> Output -> Two writes conflict on the output.
